title: lonicera caucasica subsp. orientalis
intro: Lonicera caucasica subsp. orientalis, also known as the Oriental Honeysuckle or Caucasus Honeysuckle, is a plant species of the Lonicera genus, native to the Caucasus region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Lonicera caucasica subsp. orientalis include reducing fever, relieving coughs and respiratory issues, and acting as an antioxidant to protect against cell damage. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
